target.title: [Bug]: ControlUI right-side conversation selector does not switch chats
target.body:
### Bug type
Behavior bug (incorrect output/state without crash)

### Beta release blocker
No

### Summary
In ControlUI on OpenClaw 5.27, clicking a chat in the right-side conversation selector does not switch the active conversation, while clicking chats in the left sidebar recent list does switch.

### Steps to reproduce
1. Open ControlUI in OpenClaw 5.27.
2. Go to the Chat page.
3. Click a different conversation in the left sidebar recent list and observe that the active conversation switches.
4. Open the right-side conversation selector at the top of the Chat page.
5. Click a different conversation in that selector, such as `main` or `o9cq805etzN5ei0s6Y6RRQ2T46Kq@im.wechat`.

### Expected behavior
Selecting a conversation from the right-side conversation selector should switch the active chat to that conversation, matching the left sidebar behavior.

### Actual behavior
Selecting a conversation from the right-side conversation selector does not switch the active chat. The selected chat remains unchanged.

### OpenClaw version
5.27

### Operating system
NOT_ENOUGH_INFO

### Install method
NOT_ENOUGH_INFO

### Model
GLM-5, based on the provided screenshot.

### Provider / routing chain
tencentcodingplan/glm-5, based on the provided screenshot.

### Additional provider/model setup details
NOT_ENOUGH_INFO

### Logs, screenshots, and evidence
The provided screenshot shows the Chat page with the right-side conversation selector open. The left sidebar highlights `100032691543`, and the selector lists `o9cq805etzN5ei0s6Y6RRQ2T46Kq@im.wechat`, `main`, and `100032691543`. The reporter observed that clicking items in the left sidebar switches conversations, while clicking items in the right-side selector does not.

### Impact and severity
Affected: ControlUI Chat users who use the right-side conversation selector.
Severity: Annoying; the right-side selector is not usable for switching chats.
Frequency: NOT_ENOUGH_INFO
Consequence: Users must use the left sidebar recent list to switch chats.

### Additional information
NOT_ENOUGH_INFO
